description.value:
An ancient sickle-sword with an inner hook ideal for disarming and tripping opponents. Light and effective, the khopesh punishes enemies who rely on heavy weapons or sure footing.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Light, Melee d6, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Light, Melee 2d4, Disarm, Keen, Trip
MasterOne-Handed, Light, Melee 2d4, Disarm, Keen, Trip â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkA successful Trip reduces the target's speed by 10 ft and the target has disadvantage on Strength saving throws until the start of your next turn.

rmeData.masterPerk: A successful Trip reduces the target's speed by 10 ft and the target has disadvantage on Strength saving throws until the start of your next turn.
